title: ZA - gunpowder
description: This mod adds new simple ways to obtain gunpowder
body:
This mod adds new way to craft gunpowder with sulfur. Sulfur can be found in geysers 
and crafted into gunpowder. Perfect mod if u need more gunpowder and dont wonna just a new ore.

This mod adds:
- New gunpowder recepies
- Sulfur and its block, geyser, crystal.
- Niter for advanced gunpowder crafting.
